channel.title: Book Review on Everything is a Freaking DNS problem
channel.description: Recent content in Book Review on Everything is a Freaking DNS problem

item.title: Drupal Multimedia .. reviewed.
item.description:
After reviewing the Zenoss book , Packt asked me if I would be interested in reviewing one of their fresh Drupal books, they first suggested a book on Theming but but I opted for the [MultiMedia by Aaron Winborn one as Theming really isn’t my cup of tee](http://www.packtpub.com/create-multimedia-website-with-drupal/book)

It took me a while to get the book finished , mostly because of other priorities that kept popping up and being ill for the first week of the year .. but I finally managed
